source.note: File was originally created from Round 1 screenshots, then updated with Round 2 screenshots. The visible round troop totals align with end-of-selected-round totals rather than start-of-round totals.

notes: Screenshots capture Round 1 details, Round 2 details, and selected round troop totals.
No final battle outcome was visible in the supplied screenshots.
The Shieldbearer core traded slightly ahead in Round 2 against a larger Spearmen army.

observed_round_1_events: Under Warrior's Resilience from Vhagar: +16% Tactical damage.
Under Ebbing Fury from Rhysarion: -27.5% damage.
Forest's Instinct affected Rhysarion and Vhagar: +8% Physical damage.
Forest's Instinct affected Rhysarion and Vhagar: -8% Tactical damage received.
Basic Attack hit Crimson for 194 Physical damage; Crimson had 7,291 troops remaining.

round_2.interpretation: The Shieldbearer core traded slightly ahead in Round 2 despite entering the round with fewer troops.

mechanics_observed.observation: Applied -27.5% damage to both sides in the early battle, suppressing burst during the first captured rounds.
Triggered in Round 1, granting +8% Physical damage and -8% Tactical damage received to Vhagar and Rhysarion.
Round 2 Warden's Rally dealt 295 Tactical damage to Crimson, the largest player-side single hit captured in Round 2.
Round 2 Fiery Bonds dealt 278 Physical damage to Crimson and Vhagar remained the center-line tank into enemy Venator.
Round 2 Dawnsong spread small Fire hits across all three enemies: 39 to Crimson, 36 to Venator, and 29 to Syrax.
Enemy Syrax buffed enemy Syrax, Venator, and Crimson with +7.602% Intelligence and +7.602% Instinct in Round 1.
Enemy Venator continued to pressure multiple lanes in Round 2 with Feral Strike hits to Rhysarion and Malachite.
Enemy Crimson dealt 318 Fire damage to Vhagar in Round 2.
